assertions.description: Output includes a tag bank of 20-30 tags organized into three tiers (Niche, Mid-Range, Broad) with clear tier labels
Usage rules section contains 5-7 platform-specific guidelines, not generic social media advice
At least one honest caveat about hashtag effectiveness is included

assertion_results.note: 24 tags across three tiers with clear labels
Usage rules address Instagram-specific mechanics including algorithm behavior
Caveat about declining hashtag effectiveness on Instagram included
22 tags across three tiers for TikTok
Rules address TikTok's interest-based algorithm vs hashtag-driven discovery
Honest note about TikTok hashtags being less important than content quality
26 tags including EU policy terminology across tiers
LinkedIn-specific guidance on 3-5 professional tags per post
Caveat about LinkedIn hashtag reach being less measurable than Instagram

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
